name: spec-writing-verification
description: Per-story verification of the output of /spec-writing for completeness, coherence, INVEST compliance, and template fidelity. Spawns a fresh agent to audit specs/story-NNN-slug/STORY.md + specs/story-NNN-slug/features/*.feature against the spec-writing skill's templates and rules. Produces a structured compliance report with pass/fail verdicts, specific findings, and actionable recommendations (fix or proceed to /plan-writing). Use this skill after running /spec-writing for a specific story, before running /plan-writing for that same story. Also triggers on: "verify the spec for US-NNN", "audit the story spec", "check INVEST compliance", "are the specs ready", "validate spec before planning".
